title: ICTA Announces 2026 Digital Sovereignty Initiative
summary: The Information and Communication Technology Agency (ICTA) has unveiled a comprehensive roadmap for 100% digital public services by year-end.
description: ICTA 2026 initiative aims to integrate all government departments into a single unified digital identity system, ensuring seamless service delivery for every citizen.

title: Online Passport Renewal Now Available
summary: Citizens can now renew their passports entirely online through the new digital portal.
description: The government has launched a new online portal for passport renewals, reducing wait times and eliminating the need for physical visits to specialized offices.

title: Unified Health App Launched for All Public Hospitals
summary: A new mobile application now allows citizens to book appointments and view records across all major public hospitals.
description: The Ministry of Health has introduced a first-of-its-kind mobile platform that synchronizes patient records between district and national hospitals, enabling better continuity of care.

title: Digital Tax Filing for Small Businesses
summary: A new simplified tax filing system has been launched for small and medium enterprises.
description: Small and medium enterprises (SMEs) can now benefit from a streamlined digital tax filing system, making compliance easier and more efficient.

title: Government Announces Agri-Tech Modernization Subsidy
summary: Farmers implementing smart irrigation and drone technology are now eligible for up to 50% state funding.
description: To boost export quality and ensure food security, the Department of Agriculture is providing financial assistance for farmers who adopt modern agricultural technologies.

title: Extended Business License Renewal Period
summary: The deadline for annual business license renewals has been extended by 30 days.
description: Due to the implementation of new digital systems, the government has decided to extend the business license renewal period to ensure all businesses have sufficient time to transition.
